MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-05-2008 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT XIU GUAN'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN PART AND DENIED THE APPLICATION IN PART. THE COURT GRANTED WAIVER OF ADDITION COURT FEES AS TO JURY FEES AND PER DIEM FEES, AND DENIED AS TO WAIVER OF FEES FOR COURT INTERPRETER. ORDER SIGNED AND SENT BY THE COURT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JIU YUAN TAN'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. JIU YUAN TAN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: D.LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
